name.message: VoiceMux Bridge - Smartphone Voice Typing for PC (Speech-to-Text)

description.message: Use your smartphone's voice typing (speech-to-text) on your PC browser. Speak on your phone and enter text on websites.

confirm_reset.message:
This will disconnect the PC and smartphone.
Draft text being edited in this room will be cleared on both the PC and the smartphone.
If you need to keep the draft, copy it first and save it by pasting into Spool or another app.

mobile_ready_title.message: Use phone input on this PC

mobile_connected_note.message:
If something goes wrong:
• Reload that web page
• Open the extension again
• Scan the QR code again

mobile_connecting_note.message: Phone presence is still being confirmed. If it already works, you can keep using voice input.

options_description.message: Save extra input settings for individual sites. You can find pre-made configurations in our Site-Specific Settings Examples.
